titleStmt.title: SII 30.259: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 259. (A.R. No. 611 of 1915.) Teṉmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Tripuranāthēśvara temple—on the south wall of the central shrine Māṟ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year •• +1, Vrichika 2[5], ba.di. 1, Sunday, Rōhini: Sunday, Nov. 21, 1249 A.D.

summary.p: It registers the gift of one mā of tax-free land to the temple of Tiruppāttīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār by the māhāsabha of Śri Sundara-pāṇḍya chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri-nāḍu for burning a twilight lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku
tiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu vṛscikanāyaṟṟu Irupattāṟān tiya
tiyum Apara pakṣattu prathamaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ Ārināṭṭu brahmadecam śrīcuntarapāṇṭi
ya ccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Uṭaiyār tiruppā
(r)ttiśvavaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku santyādīpattukku Iṟaiyi
li tevatāṉamākak kuṭutta nilamāvatu vaṭamalaiyil puravari
vatikku meṟku śrī Uruttiranārācattukku vaṭakku 8 10 9 kaṇṇā
ṟṟu 6 cela vaṭakkaṭaiya rūpāy 4 kāṇi kiḻakkaṭaiya 10 1-6 cela rūpāym m Ā
ka vaṭakkaṭaiya rūpāy 4 kāṇi l
1 rūpāy Orumā Innilamoru māvum vīrapāṇṭiyaṉ ko
llai Oru māvāka Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka Aṉu
pavippārākavum Ippaṭi Aṉupavikku(m)miṭattu mikkārāṇmai
yuṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka Innilamorumāvumaṉu
pavippārākavum Aṉupavikkummiṭattu kaṭamai viṉiyokam
poṉvari maṟṟumepperppaṭṭaṉavun tavintu Iṟaiyili tevatā
ṉamāka Aṉupavippārākavum Ippaṭikku candrātittavaṟ celvatāka
kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Innilam Oru māvu nāṉkellaiyi
lun tiruccūlakkallu nāṭṭi Aṉupavippārākavum Ippaṭi sammatit
tuk kārāṇmaiyuṭpaṭa dharmadāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka pramāṇam
paṇṇik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruppāttiśvaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉāṟku mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭikku Ivai pākaḷūr nārāyaṇa bha
ṭṭa somaiyājiyār makaṉ Iḷaiyavilli Eḻuttu Ivai ku
Digital edition of SII 30.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
